text: Start from the beginning and tell me everything.
Walk me through what happened last night.
Explain this to me clearly.
What exactly was taken from the house?
If I show proof, will you finally be honest?
What was your plan after taking it?
What time did you go to bed yesterday?
When did you wake up this morning?
Where were you around two in the morning?
Give me the timeline from before midnight onward.
What happened first after dinner?
I need a timeline from 11 PM to 9 AM.
That sounds stressful, take your time.
I am listening, no rush.
If you are in trouble, it is better to say it now.
I am giving you a chance to control how this ends.
If you do not know, just say you do not know.
You can be honest with me and we can handle this.
The safe has no pry marks and no visible damage.
The alarm was disarmed at 2:13 and rearmed at 2:20.
Most of the broken glass is inside the study.
This pawn receipt is signed by you.
You received a final debt notice due on February second.
The security logs and receipt both point to you.
That does not match what you said earlier.
You said the safe was forced, but there is no damage.
So they entered, disarmed the alarm, and left no trace?
Your story is not consistent with the evidence.
How do you explain this contradiction?
Those details do not line up at all.
I will wait.
Take a moment before you answer.
No rush, I can sit here quietly.
Stop wasting my time and tell the truth.
Confess now before this gets worse.
You are lying to me.
Do not make me prove every lie you just told.
This is your last chance to come clean.
We are done talking for now.
Interview ended.
I am ending this session.
That is all for today, we are finished.
Can you tell me where the bus station is?
What do you have for sale in your shop?
Hello detective, nice weather today.
Goodbye, I will come back later.
